overall_assessment.fls_score_context: This video contains educational demonstrations of Tasks 4 and 5 (suturing techniques) rather than Task 3 (Endoloop). No valid Task 3 score can be generated from this content.
overall_assessment.session_headline: Video content mismatch - contains suturing demonstrations instead of endoloop technique

rubric_insights.observation: Video shows extracorporeal and intracorporeal suturing demonstrations with Penrose drain setup, not endoloop deployment around foam appendages.
rubric_insights.impact_on_score: No Task 3 score possible - video does not contain required endoloop content

technique_coaching.observation: This appears to be an educational video demonstrating proper suturing techniques for FLS Tasks 4 and 5, not Task 3 endoloop placement.
technique_coaching.why_it_matters: Task 3 requires specific skills in ligating loop deployment, spatial targeting of foam appendages, and cinching technique - none of which are demonstrated in this video.
technique_coaching.correction: For Task 3 practice, you need a video showing: foam appendages of varying sizes, pre-tied ligating loops, loop deployment around appendages, and proper cinching technique.

drill.name: Task 3 Setup Verification
drill.description: Ensure your practice setup includes the FLS Task 3 board with foam appendages (small, medium, large) and pre-tied ligating loops. Practice loop deployment without timing pressure first.
drill.success_criteria: Correct Task 3 equipment setup with foam appendages visible

strengths_to_reinforce.observation: The educational video demonstrates excellent suturing technique with clear needle handling and knot formation
strengths_to_reinforce.why_it_matters: While not Task 3 content, the demonstrated instrument control and precision will transfer well to endoloop manipulation when you practice the correct task.
strengths_to_reinforce.encouragement: Your instrument handling skills shown in previous sessions (scores of 508-556) indicate good dexterity that will serve you well in Task 3.

practice_plan.session_focus: Obtain correct Task 3 setup and begin endoloop fundamentals

warmup_drill.name: Equipment Verification
warmup_drill.description: Confirm you have the FLS Task 3 board with foam appendages and pre-tied ligating loops before beginning practice.

primary_drill.name: Basic Loop Deployment
primary_drill.description: Practice opening and positioning ligating loops around the largest foam appendage first. Focus on smooth loop opening and controlled placement.
primary_drill.success_criteria: Consistent loop opening without tangling, accurate placement around appendage

integration_drill.name: Progressive Appendage Sizing
integration_drill.description: Once comfortable with large appendage, progress to medium then small appendages. Each requires more precise loop control.
integration_drill.success_criteria: Successful loop placement on all three appendage sizes

practice_plan.cooldown: Review: Did I maintain loop integrity throughout deployment? Was my cinching smooth and controlled?
practice_plan.estimated_sessions_to_improvement: 2-3 sessions to establish basic Task 3 technique with correct equipment

progress_context.vs_baseline: Previous sessions show Task 3 scores ranging from 28 to 600 points, suggesting inconsistent technique or equipment issues.
progress_context.vs_peak: Best recorded Task 3 score of 600 points indicates potential for proficiency when technique is consistent.
progress_context.milestone_note: Next target: Consistent Task 3 attempts with proper equipment setup, aiming for scores above 400 points.
progress_context.plateau_risk: Cannot assess plateau risk without valid Task 3 content in current video.

coaching_limitations: Cannot provide Task 3-specific technique coaching based on this video content. Assessment is limited to identifying the content mismatch and recommending proper Task 3 setup.
disclaimer: AI coaching supplements but does not replace hands-on instruction from a qualified surgical educator. Ensure you have the correct FLS Task 3 equipment before practicing endoloop techniques.
